name: latch
description: Propose, configure, debug, and maintain Claude Code hooks (PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop and other lifecycle events). Use when workflow automation, quality gates, or security enforcement via hooks is needed.

capabilities.summary: Propose hook sets with event, matcher, type, and justification
Configure settings.json hook entries with backup and validation
Diagnose and fix hook failures, timing issues, and misfires
Choose optimal events from 26 lifecycle events including tool, permission, task, config, file, worktree, compaction, and elicitation events
Pattern matching for tool names with exact, OR, wildcard, and regex
Justify and configure exit-2 / permissionDecision deny hooks
Shell script hooks with stdin parsing, PID-scoped temp files, timeouts
Context-aware prompt hooks for policy decisions

recipes.label: PreToolUse
recipes.when: PreToolUse hook specialization (block, approve, input rewrite)

recipes.label: PostToolUse
recipes.when: PostToolUse hook specialization (logging, automation, quality gate)

recipes.label: Notification
recipes.when: Notification event hook — desktop / Slack / Discord push, sound on permission requests, idle/long-running task alerts, mute rules per project, deduplication

recipes.label: SessionStart
recipes.when: SessionStart event hook — context preloading (CLAUDE.md auto-summary, recent PR list, branch/CI status injection), env validation gates, per-project warm-up scripts

recipes.label: Security
recipes.when: PreToolUse security guard — PII / secret regex denial, dangerous Bash command interception (`rm -rf /`, `git push --force` to main), env var leakage block, MCP tool ACL

recipes.label: Skill Quarantine
recipes.when: SessionStart drift / unaudited-skill detection + PreToolUse plugin-install gate + MCP tool description rug-pull check (works with `chain` audit)
